unit.note: shared/tests measured directly (4946 passed / 15 skipped / 338s). Full F0 canonical runner: 18/18 test units GREEN, 0 failures — the per-test aggregate across all 18 isolated units is not persisted by the parallel runner, so this records the largest directly-measured unit plus the authoritative all-green suite result.

integration.note: the three FR-catalog contract guards (contract/parsers/convergence) re-run green at the 16-FR count

surface_verification.justification: Framework prompt-docs (shared/requirement-elicitation.md + context-format.md) + a pytest drift guard + an FR mint; no startable user-facing web/cli/api surface. The mechanical oracle is the drift suite test_requirement_elicitation_refs.py, run green in the F0 full suite. No API/store/SSE/UI-consumed code touched, so the Backend-affects-Frontend rule does not fire.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — one binding shared elicitation doc, cited by all four interview surfaces (reverse drift)
AC2 — the §8 coverage checklist + Basis: assumed stop-condition + six dimensions (section-scoped) + never-skipped/not-finished rules are present
AC3 — the grilling method sections are retained and Matt Pocock is attributed
AC4 — the CONTEXT.md format doc exists, retains sections, and states the CONTEXT.md-vs-glossary.md distinction (domain vs framework, 'never merge')
AC5 — the drift guard fires in BOTH directions when the docs/citations are absent (mutation probe)
behaviors.evidence: mutation probe: with docs+citations absent the guard produced 25 failures (22 forward, 3 reverse); after authoring docs+citations, 28/28 PASS. Cross-ref pins added (test_module_pins_its_internal_cross_references).

behaviors.behavior: AC6 — FR-01.16 minted in spec.md with the intended row (Basis: interview, Layers: unit (inferred)), AC block, and the whole-spec count consistently pinned at 16
behaviors.evidence: integration-tests: test_fr_table_shape_convergence (FR-01.16 Basis=interview, Layers=['unit']) + catalog_contract/parsers (16-FR count, anchors, RTM deep-link to #fr-0116) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Agent actually elicits full context given the shared prompt (behavioural quality of grilling)
behaviors.reason: no deterministic oracle for LLM prompt-following; mitigated structurally — the coverage checklist makes COVERAGE the measured output (Basis: assumed marks are audit-visible), and it is dogfooded in Phase 2. Same posture as the fr-authoring 'agents write better FRs' row.
